response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior/staff-level full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators) at re:cinq. However, the role calls for a Director-level individual contributor with 15 years of experience, recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and the gravitas to advise strategic customers on cloud/AI adoption. The resume shows roughly 11-14 years of professional experience, no advanced degree in AI, no recognized AI thought leadership, and only nascent AI-agent work. The profile is well short of Principal/Director IC bar for an AI strategy role.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, workshops, open-source founder of GISCollective)
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized expertise required for a Principal AI Strategy role
Career trajectory tops out at Senior/Staff IC — lacks Director-level scope, strategic advisory, or executive-stakeholder experience
No advanced AI degree and limited evidence of cloud/AI architecture leadership or thought leadership in the field

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise / AI products built
Seniority gap vs. Director-level IC scope
